title: Welcome to the BCA Portal!
author: BCA Admin
content: This is your central hub for all study materials, video lectures, and updates. Check back regularly for new content and announcements.

title: Mid-Term Exam Schedule Announced
author: Examination Controller
content: Mid-term exams will begin from July 15, 2026. Please check the exam schedule in the Curriculum section. Admit cards will be available from July 1.

title: Guest Lecture on AI & ML
author: Student Council
content: We are excited to host a guest lecture on Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning by Dr. Sharma on June 25, 2026 at 11:00 AM in the Seminar Hall. All students are encouraged to attend.

title: New Study Materials Uploaded
author: BCA Admin
content: New notes for BCA-151 (Discrete Structure) and BCA-152 (Microprocessor) have been uploaded. Check the respective subject pages.
